---
title: CV - Advanced Customization Showcase
author: "Alex Chen"
format:
  quarto-cv-typst: default
date: 2026-05-01
date-prefix: "Last updated: "
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false

# =============================================================================
# SHOWCASE: Advanced Customization Features
# This template demonstrates maximum personalization:
# - Per-section custom colors
# - Square photo
# - Large sidebar (45% width)
# - Multi-level timeline
# - 2-column layouts with plots
# - R and Python visualizations
# =============================================================================

metadata-files:
  - ../_extensions/quarto-cv/themes/classic-blue.yml

# =============================================================================
# Personal Info
# =============================================================================
sidebar:
  photo: "../assets/img/image.png"
  phone: "+33 7 98 76 54 32"
  email: "alex.chen@example.com"
  birthdate: "22/07/1998"
  city: "Lyon, France"
  nationality: "Franco-Chinese"
  permit: "Driving License B"
  website: "https://alexchen.dev"
  website-display: "alexchen.dev"
  linkedin: "https://linkedin.com/in/alex-chen"
  linkedin-display: "\\@alex-chen"
  github: "https://github.com/achen"
  github-display: "\\@achen"

# =============================================================================
# Sidebar Defaults: Global spacing for all sections (can be overridden per-section)
# =============================================================================
sidebar-defaults:
  text-size: 9pt
  title-size: 11pt
  icon-size: 11pt
  title-after: 0.8em         # Space below section title
  item-after: 0.6em          # Space below each item
  section-after: 2em         # Space below entire section

# =============================================================================
# ADVANCED: Custom sidebar styling with per-section colors & fonts
# =============================================================================
sidebar-sections:

  # Square photo with custom styling
  - id: photo
    style:
      section-before: 0em
      photo-size: 70pt
      photo-radius: 0%              # SQUARE instead of circular
      photo-border: true
      photo-border-width: 2pt
      section-after: 1em

  # Contact with custom accent color
  - id: contact
    title: "Contact"
    items:
      - type: phone
      - type: email
      - type: city
      - type: birthdate
      - type: linkedin
      - type: github
    style:
      item-after: 3em
      section-after: 0em
      title-size: 11pt
      text-size: 8.5pt
      icon-color: "#25EBDB"
      title-color: "#AF1E42"         # Custom blue for contact icons

  # Languages with green accent — custom font for this section
  - id: languages
    title: "Languages"
    items:
      - name: "French"
        value: "Native"
      - name: "English"
        value: "C1 - Fluent"
      - name: "Mandarin"
        value: "B1 - Intermediate"
      - name: "Japanese"
        value: "A2 - Basic"
    style:
      text-size: 8.5pt
      text-font: "Poppins"          # Per-section font override
      section-after: 2.5em

  # Programming with orange accent — monospace atypical font
  - id: programming
    title: "Programming"
    items:
      - category: "Data Science"
        items: "Python, R, SQL, Julia"
      - category: "ML Frameworks"
        items: "TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn"
      - category: "Tools"
        items: "Git, Docker, Jupyter, Quarto"
      - category: "Cloud"
        items: "AWS, GCP, Azure ML"
      - type: birthdate
    style:
      text-size: 8pt
      text-font: "Courier New"      # Atypical monospace font for code feel
      title-font: "Courier New"     # Monospace for title too
      title-size: 12pt
      section-after: 2.5em
      icon-color: "#52F916" 
      icon-size: 5pt       # Custom orange
      category-color: "#f97316"
      item-color: "#FF0000" 

  # Research interests with purple accent
  - id: interests
    title: "Research Interests"
    items:
      - name: "AI & Ethics"
        subitems:
          - "Fairness in ML"
          - "Bias mitigation"
      - name: "Computer Vision"
        subitems:
          - "Object detection"
          - "Image classification"
      - name: "Time Series"
        subitems:
          - "Forecasting"
          - "Anomaly detection"
    style:
      title-size: 30pt
      text-size: 3pt
      icon-color: "#a855f7"         # Custom purple
      item-color: "#7c3aed"
      section-after: 10em


  # Certifications with rose accent
  - id: certifications
    title: "Certifications"
    items:
      - "AWS Certified Machine Learning — Specialty"
      - "Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer"
      - "Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera)"
    style:
      section-before: 5em
      text-size: 8pt
      section-after: 0em
      icon-color: "#ec4899"         # Custom rose

# =============================================================================
# VERY LARGE SIDEBAR: 45% width instead of default 30%
# =============================================================================
cv-layout:
  sidebar-width: 40%                # Much wider sidebar
  main-width: 2fr
  gutter: 3cm
  sidebar-bg: "#06080A"
  main-bg: "#EEE6E6"
  margins:
    top: 0cm
    bottom: 4cm
    left: 1cm
    right: 0cm
  timeline:
    dot-size: "6pt"
    line-width: "3pt"
    # dot-color and line-color inherit from sidebar.title-color (#AF1E42) by default

# =============================================================================
# CUSTOM THEME: Different colors for title, text, etc.
# =============================================================================
cv-theme:
  main-font: "Poppins"              # Global default font (fallback for all elements)
  title-font: "Inter"               # Font for section headings (H1, H2, etc.)
  text-font: "Inter"                # Font for body text and regular content

  sidebar:
    title-color: "#AF1E42"          # Dark blue titles
    text-color: "#05C525"           # Dark gray text
    accent-color: "#7169BF"         # Gray accents
    link-color: "#E1EB25"           # Blue links
    icon-color: "#2563eb"          # SVG icons
    photo-border-color: "#EB8B25"  # photo border stroke

  main:
    title-color: "#B8628C"          # Dark blue section headings
    subtitle-color: "#DEC404"       # Dark subtitle
    text-color: "#1f2937"
    link-color: "#2563eb"

  headings:
    h1: 13pt                        # Section titles
    h2: 16pt
    h3: 3pt
    normal: 7pt

# =============================================================================
# HEADER: Name, title, objective
# =============================================================================
cv-header:
  name: "Alex Chen"
  title: "ML Research Engineer · Data Scientist"
  objective: >-
    Passionate about building fair and interpretable machine learning systems.
    Expertise in deep learning, computer vision, and time series forecasting.
    Seeking opportunities to work on high-impact problems in AI ethics and responsible AI.
  name-color: "#A72222"
  name-size: "6pt"
  title-color: "#053398"
  title-size: "24pt"
  objective-bg: "#1175D9"   
---



# Technical Projects & Publications

::: {.timeline levels="2,3"}

## 2024 | Fair Vision: Bias Detection in Computer Vision Models

*Published in IEEE CVPR Workshop 2024*

Developed interpretable framework for detecting and mitigating gender/age bias in
facial recognition systems across different demographic groups.

### IEEE CVPR Workshop, Vancouver

## 2023 | TimeNet: Temporal Attention for Long-Sequence Forecasting

*Open-source library — [github.com/achen/timenet](https://github.com/achen/timenet)*

Implemented attention-based architecture for multi-step time series forecasting.
Outperformed state-of-the-art baselines (MAPE: 8.2% vs. 12.1%).
1200+ GitHub stars, active community contributions.

### GitHub, Open Source

:::

# Research Visualizations: Multi-Column Layout

::: {layout="[[50,50]]"}

### Model Performance Comparison

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Simulated model comparison data
models <- data.frame(
  model = c("Baseline", "FairRank", "FairRank+", "Our Method"),
  accuracy = c(0.82, 0.84, 0.86, 0.885),
  fairness = c(0.45, 0.72, 0.81, 0.92)
)

ggplot(models, aes(x = fairness, y = accuracy, label = model)) +
  geom_point(size = 5, color = "#2563eb") +
  geom_label(nudge_y = 0.01, size = 3.5) +
  labs(title = "Accuracy vs. Fairness Trade-off",
       x = "Fairness Score", y = "Accuracy") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ylim(0.8, 0.9) +
  xlim(0.4, 0.95)
```

### Training Curves: Loss Over Time

```{python}
#| label: fig-cars
#| fig-cap: "Cars"
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

epochs = np.arange(1, 101)
train_loss = 2.5 * np.exp(-epochs/25) + 0.1 * np.random.normal(0, 0.05, 100)
val_loss = 2.5 * np.exp(-epochs/25) + 0.15 * np.random.normal(0, 0.08, 100)

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
plt.plot(epochs, train_loss, label="Training Loss", linewidth=2, color="#2563eb")
plt.plot(epochs, val_loss, label="Validation Loss", linewidth=2, color="#ef4444", linestyle="--")
plt.xlabel("Epoch", fontsize=11)
plt.ylabel("Loss", fontsize=11)
plt.title("Model Convergence During Training", fontsize=12, fontweight="bold")
plt.legend(fontsize=10)
plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("/tmp/training_curves.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()
```

:::


# Additional Information

:::: {layout="[50, 50]"}

::: {#left-col}
**Awards & Honors**

- Prix de l'Excellence en IA (Institut Polytechnique, 2024)
- Google Cloud Challenge Winner (2023)
- Coursera Deep Learning Specialization with Distinction

:::

::: {#right-col}
| Certification | Year |
|---|---|
| AWS ML Specialty | 2024 |
| GCP Data Engineer | 2023 |
| Deep Learning | 2022 |
: Second Table {#tbl-second}
:::

::::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Pro Tip

Use custom per-section fonts with `text-font` and `title-font` to create visual hierarchy in your sidebar! See table → @tbl-second
:::
